verses.latin_vulgate: Quam dilecta tabernacula tua, Domine virtutum !
verses.douay_rheims: How lovely are thy tabernacles, O Lord of hosts!
verses.finnish_biblia: Koran lasten Psalmi, Gittitin päällä, edelläveisaajalle. (H84:2) Kuinka ihanat ovat sinun asuinsijas, Herra Zebaot!
verses.king_james: How amiable are thy tabernacles, O Lord of hosts!

verses.latin_vulgate: Concupiscit, et deficit anima mea in atria Domini ;  cor meum et caro mea exsultaverunt in Deum vivum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נִכְסְפָ֬ה וְגַם־כָּלְתָ֨ה ׀ נַפְשִׁי֮ לְחַצְר֢וֹת יְ֫הֹוָ֥ה לִבִּ֥י וּבְשָׂרִ֑י יְ֝רַנְּנ֗וּ אֶ֣ל אֵֽל־חָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: my soul longeth and fainteth for the courts of the Lord. My heart and my flesh have rejoiced in the living God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minun sieluni ikävöitsee ja halajaa Herran esikartanoihin: minun ruumiini ja sieluni iloitsee elävässä Jumalassa.
verses.king_james: My soul longeth, yea, even fainteth for the courts of the Lord: my heart and my flesh crieth out for the living God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Etenim passer invenit sibi domum,  et turtur nidum sibi, ubi ponat pullos suos :  altaria tua, Domine virtutum,  rex meus, et Deus meus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּם־צִפּ֨וֹר מָ֪צְאָה בַ֡יִת וּדְר֤וֹר ׀ קֵ֥ן לָהּ֮ אֲשֶׁר־שָׁ֢תָה אֶפְרֹ֫חֶ֥יהָ אֶֽת־מִ֭זְבְּחוֹתֶיךָ יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֑וֹת מַ֝לְכִּ֗י וֵאלֹהָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: For the sparrow hath found herself a house, and the turtle a nest for herself where she may lay her young ones: Thy altars, O Lord of hosts, my king and my God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä lintu on huoneen löytänyt, ja pääskynen pesänsä, johonka he poikansa laskevat: sinun alttaris, Herra Zebaot, minun kuninkaani ja minun Jumalani.
verses.king_james: Yea, the sparrow hath found an house, and the swallow a nest for herself, where she may lay her young, even thine altars, O Lord of hosts, my King, and my God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Beati qui habitant in domo tua, Domine ;  in sæcula sæculorum laudabunt te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֭שְׁרֵי יוֹשְׁבֵ֣י בֵיתֶ֑ךָ ע֝֗וֹד יְֽהַלְל֥וּךָ סֶּֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed are they that dwell in thy house, O Lord: they shall praise thee for ever and ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Autuaat ovat, jotka sinun huoneessas asuvat: he kiittävät sinua ijankaikkisesti, Sela!
verses.king_james: Blessed are they that dwell in thy house: they will be still praising thee. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Beatus vir cujus est auxilium abs te :  ascensiones in corde suo disposuit,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַשְׁרֵ֣י אָ֭דָם עֽוֹז־ל֥וֹ בָ֑ךְ מְ֝סִלּ֗וֹת בִּלְבָבָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed is the man whose help is from thee: in his heart he hath disposed to ascend by steps,
verses.finnish_biblia: Autuaat ovat ne ihmiset, jotka sinun pitävät väkenänsä, ja sydämestänsä vaeltavat sinun jälkees,
verses.king_james: Blessed is the man whose strength is in thee; in whose heart are the ways of them.

verses.latin_vulgate: in valle lacrimarum, in loco quem posuit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֹבְרֵ֤י ׀ בְּעֵ֣מֶק הַ֭בָּכָא מַעְיָ֣ן יְשִׁית֑וּהוּ גַּם־בְּ֝רָכ֗וֹת יַעְטֶ֥ה מוֹרֶֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the vale of tears, in the place which he hath set.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jotka käyvät itkun laakson lävitse, ja tekevät siellä kaivoja; ja opettajat monella siunauksella kaunistetaan.
verses.king_james: Who passing through the valley of Baca make it a well; the rain also filleth the pools.

verses.latin_vulgate: Etenim benedictionem dabit legislator ;  ibunt de virtute in virtutem :  videbitur Deus deorum in Sion.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֵ֭לְכוּ מֵחַ֣יִל אֶל־חָ֑יִל יֵרָאֶ֖ה אֶל־אֱלֹהִ֣ים בְּצִיּֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: For the lawgiver shall give a blessing, they shall go from virtue to virtue: the God of gods shall be seen in Sion.
verses.finnish_biblia: He saavat yhden voiton toisen jälkeen, että tunnettaisiin oikia Jumala Zionissa.
verses.king_james: They go from strength to strength, every one of them in Zion appeareth before God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domine Deus virtutum, exaudi orationem meam ;  auribus percipe, Deus Jacob.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְ֘הֹוָ֤ה אֱלֹהִ֣ים צְ֭בָאוֹת שִׁמְעָ֣ה תְפִלָּתִ֑י הַאֲזִ֨ינָה אֱלֹהֵ֖י יַעֲקֹ֣ב סֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: O Lord God of hosts, hear my prayer: give ear, O God of Jacob.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra Jumala Zebaot, kuule minun rukoukseni: ota, Jakobin Jumala, tätä korviis, Sela!
verses.king_james: O Lord God of hosts, hear my prayer: give ear, O God of Jacob. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Protector noster, aspice, Deus,  et respice in faciem christi tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מָ֭גִנֵּנוּ רְאֵ֣ה אֱלֹהִ֑ים וְ֝הַבֵּ֗ט פְּנֵ֣י מְשִׁיחֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Behold, O God our protector: and look on the face of thy Christ.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katsele siis, Jumala, meidän kilpemme, katso sinun voideltus kasvoja.
verses.king_james: Behold, O God our shield, and look upon the face of thine anointed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia melior est dies una in atriis tuis super millia ;  elegi abjectus esse in domo Dei mei  magis quam habitare in tabernaculis peccatorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י טֽוֹב־י֥וֹם בַּחֲצֵרֶ֗יךָ מֵ֫אָ֥לֶף בָּחַ֗רְתִּי הִ֭סְתּוֹפֵף בְּבֵ֣ית אֱלֹהַ֑י מִ֝דּ֗וּר בְּאׇהֳלֵי־רֶֽשַׁע׃
verses.douay_rheims: For better is one day in thy courts above thousands. I have chosen to be an abject in the house of my God, rather than to dwell in the tabernacles of sinners.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä yksi päivä esikartanoissas on parempi kuin tuhannen muualla: ennen minä olisin ovenvartia Jumalani huoneessa, kuin asuisin jumalattomain majoissa.
verses.king_james: For a day in thy courts is better than a thousand. I had rather be a doorkeeper in the house of my God, than to dwell in the tents of wickedness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia misericordiam et veritatem diligit Deus :  gratiam et gloriam dabit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י שֶׁ֨מֶשׁ ׀ וּמָגֵן֮ יְהֹוָ֢ה אֱלֹ֫הִ֥ים חֵ֣ן וְ֭כָבוֹד יִתֵּ֣ן יְהֹוָ֑ה לֹ֥א יִמְנַע־ט֝֗וֹב לַֽהֹלְכִ֥ים בְּתָמִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: For God loveth mercy and truth: the Lord will give grace and glory.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Herra Jumala on aurinko ja kilpi: Herra antaa armon ja kunnian: ei hän anna hurskailta mitään hyvää puuttua.
verses.king_james: For the Lord God is a sun and shield: the Lord will give grace and glory: no good thing will he withhold from them that walk uprightly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non privabit bonis eos qui ambulant in innocentia :  Domine virtutum, beatus homo qui sperat in te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֥ה צְבָא֑וֹת אַֽשְׁרֵ֥י אָ֝דָ֗ם בֹּטֵ֥חַ בָּֽךְ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: He will not deprive of good things them that walk in innocence: O Lord of hosts, blessed is the man that trusteth in thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra Zebaot, autuas on se ihminen, joka sinuun uskaltaa.
verses.king_james: O Lord of hosts, blessed is the man that trusteth in thee.
